source.business_scenario: 强制 NL 提示(测试 NL 触发)
source.redaction_notes: Synthetic Pagila schema; no real customer data

input.sql:
SELECT /*+ nestloop(r p) */ r.rental_id, p.amount
FROM rental r
INNER JOIN payment p ON r.rental_id = p.rental_id
WHERE r.customer_id BETWEEN 1 AND 10
input.explain_output:
-- @id: Q17
-- @target: JOIN-001
-- @severity: warning
-- @scenario: 强制 NL 提示(测试 NL 触发)
SELECT /*+ nestloop(r p) */ r.rental_id, p.amount
FROM rental r
INNER JOIN payment p ON r.rental_id = p.rental_id
WHERE r.customer_id BETWEEN 1 AND 10;

Nested Loop  (cost=0.00..5656.46 rows=267 width=10) (actual time=0.169..60.968 rows=278 loops=1)
  ->  Partition Iterator  (cost=0.00..282.49 rows=16049 width=10) (actual time=0.014..4.598 rows=16049 loops=1)
        Iterations: 7
        ->  Partitioned Seq Scan on payment p  (cost=0.00..282.49 rows=16049 width=10) (actual time=0.045..2.360 rows=16049 loops=7)
              Selected Partitions:  1..7
  ->  Index Scan using rental_pkey on rental r  (cost=0.00..0.32 rows=1 width=4) (actual time=49.768..49.838 rows=278 loops=16049)
        Index Cond: (rental_id = p.rental_id)
        Filter: ((customer_id >= 1) AND (customer_id <= 10))
        Rows Removed by Filter: 15771
Total runtime: 61.200 ms
